title: Aliquoting - 2ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Links
steps.instruction: Links: * [Manual Cleave](./121d15) * [Manual Cleave Elution (Off-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-4) * [Manual Cleave, ACN + Elution (Off-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-5) * [Manual Cleave, ACN + Elution (On-deck Vacuum)](./121d15-6) * [HPLC Picking](./121d15-3) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner MASTERBLOCK 96 Well Plate 500 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Greiner-500) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner MASTERBLOCK 96 Well Plate 1000 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Greiner-1000) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Irish Life Sciences 96 Well Plate 2200 µL)](./121d15-2-96-Irish-2200) * [Redo Replacement Picking (Greiner Masterblock 384 Well Plate 225 µL)](./121d15-2-384) * [Aliquoting - 2ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-2ml-aliquot) * [Aliquoting - 15ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-15ml-aliquot) * [Pooling - 2ml Tuberack to 2ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-2ml-pool) * [Pooling - 2ml Tuberack to 15ml Tuberack](./121d15-7-2ml-15ml-pool) This protocol performs a custom aliquoting protocol from a worklist. The worklist should be specified as follows: ``` Number 8 pos TB_RCK_1,pos MTP_1,transfer_vol TUBE BAR 1,TUBE BAR 1 1,1,200 2,35,200 3,2,150 4,90,100 5,84 6,62 7,42 8,18 ... ``` ---

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
